rationale: Trading terminals need high density, precision, and low eye strain. Dark theme with strict grid layouts and monospaced data alignment provides an institutional Bloomberg/Koyfin-caliber experience.

rules.overline: text-[10px] md:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-text_muted

spacing_and_layout.data_density: High density, strict tabular alignment, no loose white space. Numeric columns must right-align.

cards.style: Flat, pure structural boundaries, no shadows. 1px solid border. Cardless feeling where possible.

tables.header: text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-text_muted border-b border-border bg-background/50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-background font-bold tracking-tight rounded-sm px-4 py-2 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-surface_elevated text-text_primary transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-surface_elevated text-text_secondary hover:text-text_primary rounded-sm transition-colors

badges.base: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono rounded-sm border

motion.interactions: Minimal and instantaneous. Fast transitions (100ms) for hover states. No bouncy animations.
motion.page_load: Fade-in with a very slight upward slide (duration-300 ease-out). Staggered row reveals in tables for data loading.

icons.style: Duotone or bold. Use strict geometric icons. Avoid playful icons.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

components: Macro Top Bar (NIFTY, VIX, USDINR ticker with mono font)
Dense Data Table (Symbol, Direction, Horizon, Conviction Bar, Entry, Stop, Target, Risk)

Stock_Detail.layout: 2-column uneven split (8 col main, 4 col sidebar)

Preferences.layout: Narrow centered form or 2-column settings layout

Login.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract dark texture. Right: Minimalist authentication form.

image_urls.description: Dark moody abstract background for the Login split screen

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts
Use Shadcn UI components extensively, but strip their default rounding and heavy shadows.
Data tables must be dense with strict tabular-nums class for any pricing or percentage data.
Conviction score (0-100) should be visualized using a horizontal progress bar with semantic coloring (green for high, amber for mid, red for low depending on trade direction).
All cards must have sharp corners (max 4px radius) and 1px borders to mimic institutional terminals.
For Indian Rupee, strictly use '₹' symbol.
Ensure the 'data-testid' is added to every button, link, and form input (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Use standard JSON fetching placeholders if live data is not available, mock heavily to show UI.
Implement light and dark mode toggles if possible, but the app MUST default to dark theme.
